characters.name: Cameron Bledsoe
characters.description: This article is in need of expansion and cleanup. Please be sure to follow theguideline. Cameron BledsoeBasic InformationNickname(s)Cam (by Debbie)Age46GenderMaleBirthdate1970EthnicityAmericanOccupationsUnknownStatusAliveFamily MembersPartnersMelody Bledsoe(ex wife)Olivia(ex girlfriend)Debbie Bledsoe(wife)ChildrenEmmett Bledsoe(son)Unborn Son (via Debbie)ParentsJoy Bledsoe(mother)Show InformationPortrayed byAnthony NataleFirstappearanceThis Is Not a PipeLatestappearanceOh, Futurev-d-e When he and Melody are going though a divorce he starts dating a younger woman named Olivia who started going deaf around high school. When Emmett sells his motorcycle after getting arrested he moves in with his father. Cameron is laid back when it comes to parenting Emmett. He allows Emmett to skip school to look for parts for his new motorcycle. He and Melody got into a huge custody battle, but in the end, he just wants what is best for Emmett, and gives Melody full custody. The last time he interacted with his ex-wife, he seemed to warm up to her, and the two are friends now.

characters.name: Amanda Burke
characters.description: Amanda Burke serves as the lawyer for John and Amanda Kennish during their fight against the hospital that switched Daphne & Bay. She is soon fired after Kathryn suspects she's having an affair with Dale, a member of the Board of Directors for the hospital.. Amanda Burke was helping John and Kathryn during their trial against the hopsital. The three of them work together for a while, until Kathryn and John confront her about her relationship with the hospital board member. They believe she's not on their side. Sadly, she leaves and they don't work together again for the rest of the season, due to Craig, the new lawyer of the Kennish family.

characters.name: Amanda Burke

The three of them work together for a while, until Kathryn and John confront her about her relationship with the hospital board member. They believe she's not on their side. Sadly, she leaves and they don't work together again for the rest of the season, due to Craig, the new lawyer of the Kennish family.

characters.name: Campbell
characters.description: Campbell BingmanBasic InformationAge21GenderMaleEthnicityCaucasianOccupationsPre-med studentVolunteer at the clinicStatusSingleFamily MembersPartnersDaphne Vasquez(ex-girlfriend)NoteNo informationShow InformationPortrayed byRJ Mittev-d-e Volunteer at the clinic  Due to his recent accident which also caused his spinal injury, Campbell has nerve damage to his mouth which causes his speech to be heart slurred. Daphne, being deaf, "does not mind." He is an attractive young man with dark brown hair and brown eyes. Campbell is a friendly guy who volunteers at the free clinic where Daphne is completing her community service. He is compassionate towards the many patients at the clinic, including the many homeless youth who come for care and he also helps Daphne avoid getting into trouble with the supervising doctor at the clinic when she makes mistakes. He has a sense of humor about his and Daphne's disabilities.

characters.name: Craig Tebbe
characters.description: Craig Tebbe is an attorney that represents the Kennish family in their lawsuit against the hospital after they fire Amanda Burke. He has no other clients other than the Kennish family during the duration of the trial. He seems to have a bit of a crush onKathryn Kennish. He has a thing for red-heads, and it is known that his ex-girlfriend was also one, and left him rather broken-hearted.  Craig Tebbe is a relatively young, shy man with dark brown hair. He is tall and has a pleasant face. He is portrayed bySamuel Page.
characters.personality_section: Craig Tebbe is a relatively young, shy man with dark brown hair. He is tall and has a pleasant face. He is portrayed bySamuel Page.

characters.description: Daniel Vasquez is the father ofRegina Vasquezand the ex-husband ofAdrianna Vasquez. He was also a alcoholic. Nothing is very much known about him, except that he left Adrianna when Regina was young.

characters.name: Dr. Jackson
characters.description: Dr.Jacksonis a character that appears inSeason Threeof Switched at Birth. He is portrayed by Al White.

characters.name: Francesca Sorrento
characters.description: Francesca Sorrento is the older sister of Angelo Sorrento. It is revealed that she was 18 (Bay's age) when she died of an aneurysm, the same way Angelo died. ThepictureBay's second cousin, Sebastian shows her of Francesca looks really identical to Bay Kennish. Bay fears she shares the same trait, but after seeing a doctor she is relieved to find out that there is no sign of the same trait. Actor:Laura Marano(Picture)

characters.name: Gabe
characters.description: GabeBasic InformationAge40-45 est.GenderMaleEthnicityCaucasianOccupationsC.I. operator (formerly), Volunteer workerFamily MembersPartnersMelody Bledsoe(fiance)ChildrenEmmett Bledsoe(future step-son)Travis Barnes(foster son)Matthew(foster son)ParentsDad (mentioned)v-d-e Gabe is the fiance of Melody Bledsoe. Melody and him first meet when he sets up Cameron's C.I. (cochlear implant). He asks Cameron to give Melody his phone number. He speaks fluent sign language and mentions that his father is deaf. On Melody and his second date he takes her to Cameron's (her ex-husband) house warming party/surprise wedding/baby revealing party. He proposes to Melody on season 4 episode 16. They go through the process of adoption in the next couple of episodes.

characters.name: Teo Hanahan
characters.description: Teo HanahanBasic InformationAge18GenderMaleBirthdate1995EthnicityAmericanOccupationsStudent in the hearing pilot program atCarlton School for the Deaf(graduated)StatusAliveShow InformationPortrayed byStephen LunsfordFirstappearanceThe Door to FreedomLatestappearanceThe Awakening Consciencev-d-e  Teo is a new student in a pilot program for hearing kids atCarlton School for the Deaf. On his first day he was completely lost and came up toEmmettto ask for directions, so Emmett provided the directions in ASL. Teo still didn't understand, soDaphnegave him directions orally, at which point he mistook her for also being in the hearing program, but she explained that she was an oral deaf person and walked him to the office.

characters.name: Teo Hanahan
characters.description: Teo HanahanBasic InformationAge18GenderMaleBirthdate1995EthnicityAmericanOccupationsStudent in the hearing pilot program atCarlton School for the Deaf(graduated)StatusAliveShow InformationPortrayed byStephen LunsfordFirstappearanceThe Door to FreedomLatestappearanceThe Awakening Consciencev-d-e  Teo is a new student in a pilot program for hearing kids atCarlton School for the Deaf. On his first day he was completely lost and came up toEmmettto ask for directions, so Emmett provided the directions in ASL. Teo still didn't understand, soDaphnegave him directions orally, at which point he mistook her for also being in the hearing program, but she explained that she was an oral deaf person and walked him to the office.

She is the cousin ofJosh Padden. She was formerlyDaphne's roommate until Daphne went to China for 8 months.

characters.name: Jace
characters.description: Jace Gender: Age: Jace has auburn hair and brown eyes. He first appears inMother and Daughter Dividedand is shown to be very smart and tells Daphne he will learn to sign in a month, which he does. He likes geocaching and runs a political blog. He also is from England.
